spec.length_desc: 10-15 turns total, includes history-taking and exam

transcript:
HCP: hello, thanks for coming in today, i'm dr lee
Patient: hi, thanks for seeing me
HCP: how have you been feeling since your last appointment
Patient: honestly just terrible, i can't get out of bed much these days
HCP: that sounds really hard, can you tell me a bit more about that
Patient: yeah, i just drag myself up, the house feels huge and i have no energy
HCP: and how has your mood been lately
Patient: pretty flat, i don't feel happy or sad really, just empty
HCP: does that emptiness feel different from before
Patient: yeah, it's just a fog, nothing seems to matter anymore
HCP: are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or ending it all
Patient: no not really, just the weight is too much to carry
HCP: you seem quite quiet today, is that how you feel too
Patient: yeah, my voice feels weak and i don't want to talk to anyone
HCP: do you understand why you're here today
Patient: i know i need help, i just don't know if anything will work

behaviour.evidence_span: i can't get out of bed much these days

speech.evidence_span: my voice feels weak and i don't want to talk to anyone

mood.evidence_span: pretty flat, i don't feel happy or sad really, just empty

thought.evidence_span: just the weight is too much to carry

insight.text: partial insight — aware needs help but doubtful of treatment
insight.evidence_span: i know i need help, i just don't know if anything will work
